description_long: This is a single grave site featuring a polished black granite headstone with a gently curved top and a gold-engraved inscription, including a cross. The headstone is mounted on a rectangular, light gray stone base that extends to form a raised grave cover, bordered by a slightly elevated frame. The grave is set within a larger, tiled rectangular platform, which provides a neat and defined boundary. The headstone's front face is adorned with gold lettering and a cross, while the back is plain and unadorned. The materials used are primarily granite and stone, giving the structure a solid, durable appearance. The overall design is solemn and respectful, typical of modern European cemeteries.
description: A polished black granite headstone with gold inscriptions sits atop a raised gray stone grave, all set within a tiled rectangular platform.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain, curved black granite headstone and the full extent of the tiled platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone, the layered stone grave cover, and the depth of the tiled base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the gold-engraved inscription and cross on the headstone, with the grave cover and border clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone, the grave cover, and the tiled platform's edge.
